Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Individual

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Individual
public class Individual extends SObject

Java class for Individual complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Individual">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AuthorizationFormConsents" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BirthDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanStorePiiElsewhere" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChildrenCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CommSubscriptionConsents" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConsumerCreditScore" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConsumerCreditScoreProviderName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactPointAddresses" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactPointEmails" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactPointPhones" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Contacts" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConvictionsCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeathDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DuplicateRecordItems" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FirstName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasOptedOutGeoTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasOptedOutProcessing" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasOptedOutProfiling" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasOptedOutSolicit" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasOptedOutTracking" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Individuals" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IndividualsAge" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InfluencerRating" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsHomeOwner" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Leads" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterRecord" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Individual" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterRecordId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MilitaryService" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Occupation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PartyConsents" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PartyRoleCustomers" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PartyRoleSellers" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Salutation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SendIndividualData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldForget" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Website" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
